title: Expression and purification protocol of the Human (Homo sapiens) LC3B Ubiquitin-like modifier
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ahnsv","text":"This protocol describes expression and purification procedures for obtaining mCherry-tagged human recombinant Ubiquitin-like modifier LC3B (MAP1LC3B, Microtubule-associated proteins 1A/1B light chain 3B) lacking five C-terminal ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fdndn","text":"amino acids to allow in vitro protein conjugation to target PE, Phosphatidyl Ethanolamine.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"dc994","text":"General information","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5h09t","text":"Insert: Homo sapiens LC3B, NP_073729.1; Expression system: E.Coli Rosetta pLyss; plasmid origin: Sascha Martens Lab, Addgene 169168, lab internal construct database number SMC948; backbone: pET-Duet1; plasmid resistance: Ampicillin; tags \u0026 cleavage sites: N-term 6xHis, followed by Tobacco Etch Virus (TEV) cleavage site, mCherry tag, LC3B ORF. Ext coeff: 41830 M-1 cm-1 , MW 47,89 kDa.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":363,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":368,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":27,"length":11}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"6B9CE094C2C411EBBBD80A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/nuccore/NP_073729.1"}}}}

Reducing agents (β-mercaptoethanol and Dithiothreitol) are added after degassing step.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aj3g8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fo0nd","text":"Columns:- HT 5ml column (GE Healthcare)\n                    - S75_16/60 (GE Healthcare)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4j3mm","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2n28a","text":"Gels:10% SDS-PAGE","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transform plasmid DNA (Addgene_190237) into E.Coli Rosetta pLyss cells and plate on Ampicillin LB agar plate for Overnight at 37 °C .
The following day, inoculate a 5 mL, LB + Amp/Cam pre-culture with 1-2 colonies and grow Overnight at 37 °C shaking.
The following day, use 5 mL, pre-culture to inoculate 1 L, LB medium + Amp/Cam at 37 °C until an OD 600 (Optical Density) of 0.6 is reached.
Pellet cells at 4000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes in a Sorvall RC6+ centrifuge (Thermo Scientific), discard supernatant and resuspend pellets in ice cold lysis buffer (25 ml/1 lt culture).
Perform His-Trap affinity purification followed by Size Exclusion Chromatography.
Lyse cells by sonicating them with an immersion Tip Sonicator ( 2x 00:00:30 ). Note: adjust times and intensity according to the available instrument.
Inject soluble fraction onto a 5ml HT column operating at 4 °C pre-equilibrated in Buffer A at 1ml/min flow rate.
Wash column for 5 column volumes (CV), with Buffer A at 2 ml/min flow rate to remove unspecific bound proteins.
Elute protein at 300mM Imidazole concentration. Perform elution at 1ml/min flow rate.

Cells are lised via freeze/thaw cycles and sonication: thaw pellet corresponding to 1 L culture by freeze/thawing in Room temperature water bath. All following steps are to be executed at 4 °C or On ice .
Induce protein expression with 400 micromolar (µM), IPTG and grow for a further 16:00:00 at 18 °C shaking.
Flash freeze resuspended pellets in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until purification.
Clear lysate by spinning in a Beckman centrifuge, at 40000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes, Ti45 Rotor .
Measure protein absorbance at A 280 with a Spectrophotometer against dialysis buffer.
Aliquot protein, flash freeze in liquid Nitrogen and store at -80 °C .
Perform TEV cleavage with 1mg/ml TEV protease overnight at 4˚C while dialyzing against elution buffer containing no imidazole.
Apply cleavage reaction to equilibrated HT column, and collect the flow-through.
creator: Liv Jensen
